title: Dogs sit and beg for pancakes
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, crowd, identical sibling, third dog, extra puppy
prompt: Low-angle shot on the kitchen floor in @KitchenMorning. @Ginger sits up tall in beg position. @Joe sits next to @Ginger with tongue out. @Ginger: "Woof, please!" @Joe: "Pancake! Pancake!" @Joe: "Spin spin please!"
